latt_053_four_faces.note: Verifies 4 faces x 3 bridges grouping: {n_faces, bpf, cross_E8, all_covered, no_duplicates, n_gen_consistent, h11_consistent, status}. Framework-specific (DERIVED, not SEALED). The {i,i+4,i+8} grouping is one of 576 cross-E8-valid options.

latt_054_g2_from_e8.note: Verifies G2 3-form construction from Fano plane: {hitchin_identity, metric_is_identity, antisymmetric, seven_triples, nonzero_count, diagonal_deviation, status}. The Hitchin contraction phi_{iab}phi_{jab}=6*delta_{ij} is exact for the standard G2 3-form. Structural invariant: exactly 42 nonzero entries (7 Fano triples x 6 signed permutations). Pure algebra — no fitted parameters.

latt_055_chain_valid.note: Verifies the full derivation chain with substantive algebra: E8 Cartan determinant (det=1), Hitchin contraction identity phi_{iab}phi_{jab}=6*delta_{ij} computed from Fano plane, Leech=E8^3 (Niemeier), 12x2D bridge decomposition, 4x3 face grouping, and alpha_leak=1/sqrt(chi_eff_total/b3) derived from TCS #187 Hodge numbers (h11=4,h21=0,h31=68). Classification: PLAUSIBLE — E8/G2/Leech are theorems; bridge/face decomposition are framework choices.

c_pairs_bridge.note: Validates 12-PAIR-BRIDGE dimensional consistency with 5 checks: pairs=b3/2=12 (derived from Betti number), 12x2D=24D physics core, 24+1+2=27D bulk, signature (26,1). Classification: GEOMETRIC — dimensional arithmetic is forced; the 12x(2,0) decomposition itself is a framework choice (PLAUSIBLE).
